title: Add Helix AI to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Helix AI](https://helixai-4-0.github.io/) to chat
- # Helix AI

Fixes #10888

gist.headline: Helix AI enters the chat
gist.blurb: A new seedling has sprouted in the greenhouse. Helix AI is now officially listed in our community apps directory.
gist.summary: Added Helix AI to the Pollinations community apps showcase and greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore Helix AI directly from the community app listings.
gist.visual_concept: A literal greenhouse setting where Polly the bee is tending to a new, unique plant shaped like a double helix, representing the addition of Helix AI to the community greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing double-helix shaped plant inside a glass greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing double-helix shaped plant inside a glass greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
